summary: Comprehensive end-to-end button testing of Travel OMS. Fixed 2 remaining white screen pages (AdminCatalogPage.jsx, AdminCatalogHotelsPage.jsx). All 15 previously reported broken pages now load correctly. Tested all major navigation routes, button interactions, modal dialogs. Core functionality verified: Dashboard, Orders, CRM, Finance, Operations, Pilot, System Management pages all working.

minor.issue: 400 responses logged for webhook/telemetry endpoints - non-blocking, expected with no seeded data

integration_issues.issue: Button click does not visibly show modal/dropdown (may be expected behavior if action runs silently)

issues: HTML nesting warning: <div> inside <tbody> - non-blocking but should be fixed for semantic correctness

passed_tests: ✅ Dashboard page loads with stats and usage cards
✅ AdminCatalogPage - NOW FIXED - loads correctly with product list
✅ AdminCatalogHotelsPage - NOW FIXED - loads correctly with hotel list
✅ /app/admin/finance/settlements - loads with filters and CSV export
✅ Orders page - 'Yeni Sipariş' button opens modal with form fields
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix HTML nesting issue in AdminPartnersPage.jsx - <div> inside <tbody> warning
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed AdminCatalogPage.jsx - replaced undefined setLoading/setItems calls with proper useQuery hook
Fixed AdminCatalogHotelsPage.jsx - replaced undefined setLoading/setItems calls with proper useQuery hook
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 previously broken pages (iteration_140) are now fixed. AdminCatalogPage and AdminCatalogHotelsPage were still broken and have been fixed by adding proper useQuery hooks for data fetching. All major admin routes, CRM, Finance, Operations, Pilot, and System Management pages load correctly without white screens. The 'Demo verisi oluştur' button may need further investigation if expected to open a visible modal (currently silent action). Orders modal (Yeni Sipariş Oluştur) works correctly with all form fields.

fixes_applied.AdminCatalogPage.jsx: Added useQuery hook for product list, removed undefined setLoading/setItems calls, now using 'loading' and 'items' from query result
fixes_applied.AdminCatalogHotelsPage.jsx: Added useQuery hook for hotel product list, removed undefined setLoading/setItems calls
